allow: PowerShell(gh repo edit fmanimashaun/claude-skills --description "Agent Skills that teach Claude to build Rails 8.1 apps - vanilla-first stack, pure RSpec, Hotwire \(Turbo/Stimulus/Native\), OpenAPI via rswag, ruby_llm AI, Kamal 2 deploys" --add-topic claude --add-topic claude-code --add-topic agent-skills --add-topic rails --add-topic ruby --add-topic hotwire --add-topic turbo --add-topic stimulus --add-topic rspec --add-topic kamal)

PowerShell(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\GitHubCLI\\gh.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } })
PowerShell(Write-Output "GH_TOKEN set: $\([bool]$env:GH_TOKEN\)"; Write-Output "GITHUB_TOKEN set: $\([bool]$env:GITHUB_TOKEN\)"; winget --version 2>$null; git remote -v)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem dist\\rails-8.skill, dist\\hotwire.skill | Select-Object Name, Length; Write-Output "---"; if \(Test-Path .claude-plugin\\marketplace.json\) { \(Get-Content .claude-plugin\\marketplace.json -Raw\) })
